update.releaseNotes:
v5.4.6 - Changelog
New --- - Add the option to condense repeated log messages in the `Remote Log Viewer` (default on). - Created `HOW_IT_WORKS.md` to explain the inner workings of the bot viewable from the GitHub repo.
Adjustments --- - Optimize OCR accuracy of training failure. - Add delay before starting to load the ingame racing agenda. - Remove usage of `disabledItems` cache that would prevent usage of certain items when it is needed. - Use training items when falling back from consecutive race aborts. - Add delay before consecutive race warning check in `loadUserRaceAgenda()`. - Improve trainee condition detection. - Reject OCR stat values that exceed the stat cap instead of clamping.
Fixes --- - Fix bug where the bot was getting zero stat OCR results. - Fix not using race items before mandatory races in `Trackblazer`. - Fix inaccurate energy bar level readings due to being overtuned.
